# opsy_seristack (Action)

Runs a specific stack from a seristack type definition loaded from the provider zip bundle.

The `type` value maps to `<type>.yaml` (or `.yml`) inside the configured bundle.
For example, `type = "function"` resolves `function.yaml`.

To know more about seristack, please visit [seristack](https://seristack.getsaas.in/).

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    opsy = {
      source = "TechXploreLabs/opsy"
    }
  }
}

provider "opsy" {
  local {
    path = "${path.module}/archive.zip"
  }
}

action "opsy_seristack" "run_function" {
  config {
    type      = "function"
    stackname = "function_1"
    vars = {
      name = "opsy"
    }
  }
}
```

```bash
terraform apply -invoke=action.opsy_seristack.run_function
```

<!-- action schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `type` (String) Resource type name. Maps to `<type>.yaml` inside the scripts bundle.
- `stackname` (String) Stack name to be executed

### Optional

- `vars` (Map of String) Variables to pass to the stack
